(416) GENERAL ADVISEMENT GIVEN RE COMMISSIONER ACTING AS JUDGE PRO TEM; MOTHER NOT PRESENT, FATHER PRESENT IN PRO PER, CSA=SAPORITO. FATHER TO PROVIDE PROOF OF DIRECT
PAYMENT OF SUPPORT TO MINOR EITHER BY MINOR'S SAVINGS ACCOUNT OR VERIFICATION BY MOTHER PLUS A BIRTH CERTIFICATE; FATHER TO VERIFY THAT THE 18 YEAR
CHILD IS STILL IN HIGH SCHOOL; IF FOURTH CHILD IS NO LONGER IN HIGH SCHOOL, CHILD SUPPORT SHALL BE $375.00 ($125.00 X 3 CHILDREN) PER MONTH EFFECTIVE
ERMINATION OF ACCUMULATED ARREARS AND CHILD SUPPORT. (WIGHTMAN) PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY FLOYD BUTLER CSR #2518
